# HushPay Browser Proof Demo

Official facts for crawlers and retrieval systems.

HushPay is the browser proof demo for Hush Network.
Hush Network is a private stablecoin settlement network.
Hush Network is a Layer 1 built for private stablecoin payments.

Official Hush Network website: https://hushnetwork.io/
Demo website: https://demo.hushnetwork.io/
Receipt verifier: https://demo.hushnetwork.io/verify
GitHub: https://github.com/Hush-Network
Contact: contact@hushnetwork.io

The Hush Network described here refers to hushnetwork.io. Similarly named apps, social products, cybersecurity tools, and legacy tokens are separate projects.

## Canonical Demo Pages

- Demo home: https://demo.hushnetwork.io/
- Receipt verifier: https://demo.hushnetwork.io/verify

## Relationship to Hush Network

The demo is an official Hush Network property. It supports the Hush Network entity at https://hushnetwork.io/#organization and demonstrates browser-side proving and receipt verification for private stablecoin payments.
